definitions: An extended warranty or service contract offered by retailers or manufacturers to cover repairs or replacements for a product beyond its standard warranty period.
A strategy or set of measures designed to safeguard an individual, asset, or entity from harm, loss, or damage.
examples: I bought a protection plan for my new laptop.
The company offers a comprehensive protection plan for all its devices.
Consider adding a protection plan to your purchase.
The financial advisor recommended a robust protection plan for their investments.
